payload.name: evidence
payload.description: Rows, cells, and values that support or contradict each component of the statement.

payload.name: reasoning
payload.description: Component-wise reasoning from cited evidence to the final verdict.

payload.content: Use the `evidence` field to cite the row(s), cell(s), and values that support or contradict each component of the statement.

Use the `reasoning` field to connect the cited evidence to the label. If any required component is contradicted, set `verdict` to False; if every required component is supported, set `verdict` to True.

rationale: Pilot scaffold package for TabFact evidence-first decomposition. It deliberately combines evidence and reasoning aux fields with verdict-only final output.
